programs.name: Example Application 1
programs.comment: Example Node.js application. URL auto-generated as http://<detected-ip>:8080

programs.name: Example Application 3
programs.comment: Manual URL override. Useful for external domains or custom configurations.

programs.name: Example Application 4 (No URL)
programs.comment: No PORT env var and no URL, so no clickable link will appear

programs.name: CodeSmith
programs.comment: AI-assisted code modification UI. Connects to Ollama on desktop-glpggos via Tailscale (100.98.112.1:11434). Start.sh auto-pulls the latest from the claude/zealous-babbage-4m10qp branch. Change CODESMITH_LLM_MODEL to switch models.

programs.name: Vosk Voice Transcriber
programs.comment: Bundled sample program card for transcribing WAV audio with a local Vosk model. URL auto-generates as an HTTPS Tailscale URL when a Tailscale hostname is available. Install examples/vosk-transcriber/requirements.txt and place a model at VOSK_MODEL_PATH.

programs.name: Qwen System Assistant
programs.comment: Bundled local AI assistant. Collects read-only Linux system context and sends a compact prompt to Ollama for analysis. Run 'ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:0.5b' first, or change OLLAMA_MODEL to any installed model.
